memoryArtifacts.headline: Alnwick Castle  Northumberland, England
memoryArtifacts.description: Alnwick Castle is the 2nd largest castle in England, & has been the home of the Percy's, Earls, & Dukes of Northumberland.

zh.lifeSummary: Ellen Balliol是Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle和Agnes De Percy的女兒，於1206年出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire福爾法爾。她於1227年7月1日與William de Percy在蘇格蘭洛-爾雷卡斯特爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1281年11月22日在英國越可爾享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ellen Balliol是Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle和Agnes De Percy的女儿，于1206年出生在苏格兰Forfarshire福爾法爾。她于1227年7月1日与William de Percy在苏格兰洛-爾雷卡斯特爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1281年11月22日在英国越可爾享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩利。

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Ellen Balliol was born in 1206, in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland as the daughter of Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle and Agnes De Percy. She married William de Percy on 1 July 1227, in Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 22 November 1281, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Sawley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Ellen Balliol est née en 1206, à Forfar, Forfarshire, Écosse, fille de Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle et Agnes De Percy. Elle a épousé William de Percy le 1 juillet 1227, à Redcastle, Ross-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 novembre 1281, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Sawley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Ellen Balliol wurde 1206 in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, als Tochter von Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle und Agnes De Percy geboren. Sie hat am 1. Juli 1227 in Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland William de Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. November 1281 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Sawley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ellen Balliol è nata il nel 1206 nel Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland come figlia di Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle e Agnes De Percy. Lei sposato William de Percy il 1 luglio 1227, nel Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 novembre 1281, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Sawley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Balliolは1206年にスコットランドForfarshireフォーファルでIngram de Balliol Lord of RedcastleとAgnes De Percyの娘として生まれた。1227年7月1日にスコットランドロス-シュアイアレドカストルでWilliam de Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1281年11月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサウリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Balliol(은)는 1206년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 포파르에서 Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle(와)과 Agnes De Percy의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1227년 7월 1일 스컷랜드 로스-실르 레드카스틀에서 William de Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1281년 11월 22일 영국 요르크실르에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 사w리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ellen Balliol nasceu em 1206, em Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland filha de Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle e Agnes De Percy. Ela casou-se com William de Percy em 1 de julho de 1227, em Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1281, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Sawley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Ellen Balliol родилась в 1206 г. в местности форфар, Forfarshire, Шотландия. Её родителей звали Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle и Agnes De Percy. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Percy 1 июля 1227 г. в местности редкастл, росс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 ноября 1281 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности савли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Ellen Balliol nació en 1206, en Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland como hija de Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle y Agnes De Percy. Se casó con William de Percy el 1 de julio de 1227, en Redcastle, Ross-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1281, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Sawley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
